title: How the Other Half Hunts

"'''How the Other Half Hunts'''" was an article in [[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]]. The article covered three [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] not previously mentioned in the ''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]'', giving brief histories and stats.

==Contents==
*[[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]]
*[[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]]
*[[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]]
